ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transportation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode (e.g., Fixed-route, Demand-response) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation mode */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the mode can carry */,
  "average_speed" TEXT /* Average speed of the transportation mode */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridership_data" (
  "ridership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ridership data entry */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of day the data was collected */,
  "ridership_number" INTEGER /* Number of riders for the given time */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ridership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administration" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the administrator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., ridership, financial) */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES administration ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., ridership, trends) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., data update, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backup" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date and time the backup was performed */,
  "backup_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the backup */,
  "backup_type" TEXT /* Type of backup (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "backup_size" TEXT /* Size of the backup in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "length_km" TEXT /* Length of the segment in kilometers */,
  "start_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting stop */,
  "end_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "length_km" TEXT /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "start_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting stop */,
  "end_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stop */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "trip_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES administration ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)
